ai_summary: A full-screen hero component featuring glass morphism styling with animated gradient blobs in the background. Uses Framer Motion for smooth continuous animations and includes slots for title, description, and action buttons. Designed for modern SaaS and premium product landing pages with a dark theme and vibrant blue gradient accents.
